relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains sanctions screening hit notifications with entity matching details, while the outbound file contains complete loan applications with employment, financial, and collateral information. These represent fundamentally different business processes: inbound is a compliance alert, outbound is a credit product application. There is minimal field overlap (only name, DOB, customer ID concepts), and the outbound file's rich loan and financial data has no source in the inbound sanctions schema. The files flow in opposite logical directions within the credit workflow.
